Patricia Wolfe

Senior Partner

Boston

Corporate

Profile Overview

Patricia Wolfe is a senior partner with over twenty years of experience in mergers and acquisitions, private equity, and corporate governance. She regularly represents Fortune 500 companies and institutional investors in domestic and cross-border transactions.

Practice Areas

  • Mergers & Acquisitions
  • Private Equity
  • Corporate Governance

Industries

  • Financial Services
  • Consumer Goods

Department

Corporate

Office

Boston

Bar Admissions

  • Massachusetts, 2003
  • New York, 2004

Education

  • J.D., Harvard Law School, 2002
  • B.A. in Economics, Wellesley College, 1999
